languages.text: "Нунциус считает, что необходимость глубокой экспертизы сего потока драматически преувеличена". {n}Антиграв Эоганна увеличивает мощность, и техножрец величественно воспаряет над плещущимися нечистотами.{/n}

"Nuncius believes that the necessity of an in-depth analysis of this stream is dramatically exaggerated." {n}Eogunn's gravitic core surges with power, and the Tech-Priest ascends majestically above the sloshing sewage.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Нунциус считает, что необходимость глубокой экспертизы сего потока драматически преувеличена". {n}Антиграв Эоганна увеличивает мощность, и техножрец величественно воспаряет над плещущимися нечистотами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius believes that the necessity for a deep expertise of this stream is dramatically exaggerated." {n}Eogunn's anti-grav engine surges with power, and the Tech-Priest ascends majestically above the sloshing sewage.{/n}

"Nuncius believes that the necessity for a deep expertise of this stream is dramatically exaggerated." {n}Eogunn's anti-grav engine surges with power, and the Tech-Priest ascends majestically above the sloshing sewage.{/n}

"Nuncius believes that the necessity of an in-depth analysis of this stream is dramatically exaggerated." {n}Eogunn's gravitic core surges with power, and the Tech-Priest ascends majestically above the sloshing sewage.{/n}

"Nuncius believes that the necessity of an in-depth analysis of this stream is dramatically exaggerated." {n}Eogunn's gravitic core surges with power, and the Tech-Priest ascends majestically above the sloshing sewage.{/n}

languages.text: «Nuncius opina que la necesidad de un análisis profundo de esta corriente es una exageración dramática». {n}El núcleo gravitatorio de Eogunn zumba con energía y el tecnosacerdote se eleva, majestuoso, sobre el torrente de la cloaca.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Nuncius believes that the necessity of an in-depth analysis of this stream is dramatically exaggerated." {n}Eogunn's gravitic core surges with power, and the Tech-Priest ascends majestically above the sloshing sewage.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius opina que la necesidad de un análisis profundo de esta corriente es una exageración dramática». {n}El núcleo gravitatorio de Eogunn zumba con energía y el tecnosacerdote se eleva, majestuoso, sobre el torrente de la cloaca.{/n}

languages.text: “努恩修斯认为，对这条污水沟进行深入分析的必要性被严重夸大了。”{n}伊奥贡的重力核心骤然增强动力，这位技术神甫庄严地上升到那翻涌的污水之上。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Nuncius believes that the necessity of an in-depth analysis of this stream is dramatically exaggerated." {n}Eogunn's gravitic core surges with power, and the Tech-Priest ascends majestically above the sloshing sewage.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯认为，对这条污水沟进行深入分析的必要性被严重夸大了。”{n}伊奥贡的重力核心骤然增强动力，这位技术神甫庄严地上升到那翻涌的污水之上。{/n}

languages.text: "Nuncius glaubt, dass sich die Notwendigkeit einer eingehenden Analyse dieses Stroms dramatisch erhöht hat." {n}Eogunns Gravitationskern pulsiert mit Energie, als sich der Techpriester majestätisch über das Abwasser erhebt.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Nuncius believes that the necessity of an in-depth analysis of this stream is dramatically exaggerated." {n}Eogunn's gravitic core surges with power, and the Tech-Priest ascends majestically above the sloshing sewage.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius glaubt, dass sich die Notwendigkeit einer eingehenden Analyse dieses Stroms dramatisch erhöht hat." {n}Eogunns Gravitationskern pulsiert mit Energie, als sich der Techpriester majestätisch über das Abwasser erhebt.{/n}

languages.text: « Nuncius estime que la nécessité d'une analyse approfondie de telles immondices est par trop surfaite. » {n}Le noyau gravitationnel d'Eogunn redouble de puissance et le technoprêtre s'élève majestueusement au-dessus du flot clapotant d'eaux usées.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Nuncius believes that the necessity of an in-depth analysis of this stream is dramatically exaggerated." {n}Eogunn's gravitic core surges with power, and the Tech-Priest ascends majestically above the sloshing sewage.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius estime que la nécessité d'une analyse approfondie de telles immondices est par trop surfaite. » {n}Le noyau gravitationnel d'Eogunn redouble de puissance et le technoprêtre s'élève majestueusement au-dessus du flot clapotant d'eaux usées.{/n}

languages.text: "Nuncius, bu akıntının derinlemesine analiz edilmesinin gerekliliğinin büyük ölçüde abartıldığına inanıyor." {n}Eogunn'un yer çekimsel çekirdeği güçle doluyor. Tekno Rahip, çalkalanan lağımın üzerinde görkemli bir şekilde yükseliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Nuncius believes that the necessity of an in-depth analysis of this stream is dramatically exaggerated." {n}Eogunn's gravitic core surges with power, and the Tech-Priest ascends majestically above the sloshing sewage.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, bu akıntının derinlemesine analiz edilmesinin gerekliliğinin büyük ölçüde abartıldığına inanıyor." {n}Eogunn'un yer çekimsel çekirdeği güçle doluyor. Tekno Rahip, çalkalanan lağımın üzerinde görkemli bir şekilde yükseliyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「ヌンシウスは、この川を深く分析する必要性が劇的に誇張されていると信じる。」{n}エオグンの重力コアが力を帯び、テクプリストはぐらぐらと流れる汚水の上で堂々と昇る。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Nuncius believes that the necessity of an in-depth analysis of this stream is dramatically exaggerated." {n}Eogunn's gravitic core surges with power, and the Tech-Priest ascends majestically above the sloshing sewage.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンシウスは、この川を深く分析する必要性が劇的に誇張されていると信じる。」{n}エオグンの重力コアが力を帯び、テクプリストはぐらぐらと流れる汚水の上で堂々と昇る。{/n}
